message:
Paper bundle `Bounded Query-Adaptive Arbitration over Frozen Teacher-Anchor Packet Bundles` is ready on branch `paper/run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1`.

Overview:
- Source branch: `run/querybank_teacher_anchor_smoke_r1`
- Selected outline: `outline-002`

Summary:
Markdown-first bounded feasibility-note bundle on the active paper line. Main evidence remains the bounded query-adaptive arbitration smoke, with the repaired broader three-bundle validation and the first negative downstream-consumer bridge smoke kept only as claim-boundary notes.

Files:
- Bundle manifest: `.ds/worktrees/paper-paper-run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1/paper/paper_bundle_manifest.json`
- Draft: `/home/xinyizheng/vid_tokenizer/DeepScientist/quests/002/.ds/worktrees/paper-paper-run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1/paper/draft.md`
- Writing plan: `/home/xinyizheng/vid_tokenizer/DeepScientist/quests/002/.ds/worktrees/paper-paper-run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1/paper/writing_plan.md`
- References: `/home/xinyizheng/vid_tokenizer/DeepScientist/quests/002/.ds/worktrees/paper-paper-run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1/paper/references.bib`
- Claim-evidence map: `/home/xinyizheng/vid_tokenizer/DeepScientist/quests/002/.ds/worktrees/paper-paper-run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1/paper/claim_evidence_map.json`
- Evidence ledger: `paper/evidence_ledger.json`
- Compile report: `.ds/worktrees/paper-paper-run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1/paper/build/compile_report.json`
- Baseline inventory: `.ds/worktrees/paper-paper-run-querybank-teacher-anchor-smoke-r1/paper/baseline_inventory.json`

Next route:
Finalize the paper package, review the bundle artifacts, and publish or close the quest when ready.
